tasks.label: BKSwitcher: Request Photos Permission (VS Code host)
args: import Foundation; import Photos; import Dispatch; func statusName(_ status: PHAuthorizationStatus) -> String { switch status { case .notDetermined: return "notDetermined"; case .restricted: return "restricted"; case .denied: return "denied"; case .authorized: return "authorized"; case .limited: return "limited"; @unknown default: return "unknown(\(status.rawValue))" } }; func finish(_ status: PHAuthorizationStatus) { print("Photos auth status: \(statusName(status)) (raw=\(status.rawValue))"); if status == .authorized || status == .limited { exit(0) } else { exit(2) } }; let current = PHPhotoLibrary.authorizationStatus(for: .readWrite); if current == .notDetermined { PHPhotoLibrary.requestAuthorization(for: .readWrite) { status in finish(status) }; dispatchMain() } else { finish(current) }

tasks.label: BKSwitcher: Open Latest Photo Log
tasks.command: LATEST=$(ls -t "$HOME/Library/Caches/BKSwitcher"/wallpaper-*-photos.txt 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1p'); if [ -z "$LATEST" ]; then echo "No photo log found in ~/Library/Caches/BKSwitcher" >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "Opening $LATEST"; open "$LATEST"

tasks.label: BKSwitcher: Build + Run Once + Open Latest Photo Log (VS Code host)
dependsOn: BKSwitcher: Request Photos Permission (VS Code host)

tasks.label: BKSwitcher: Build + Run Once + Open Latest Photo Log
